_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 1-dependent alterations in mouse microglia function are not cell-intrinsic.

_contextSnippet: the number of branch points per microglial cell was reduced in male Nf1flox/wt;hGFAP-Cre (32 ± 1) compared to WT microglia (42 ± 1; p < 0.0001)...there was a sexually dimorphic decrease in the cumulative process lengths
details: Male Nf1flox/wt;hGFAP-Cre microglia showed reduced branch points (32 ± 1) compared to WT (42 ± 1; p < 0.0001) and decreased process lengths (500 ± 14 μm vs 652 ± 16 μm; p < 0.0001)
